blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 52°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
